headline: Tyler Technologies Is Down by More Than 50% as Investors Flee SaaS Stocks, but Are Government Agencies Really Rushing to Adopt AI?
summary: A multiyear cloud migration plan should deliver revenue growth in a corner of the market where AI is unlikely to disrupt older business models overnight.
